Uses of Class
neqsim.process.research.ProcessResearchSpec

Packages that use ProcessResearchSpec
Package
Description
neqsim.process.research
Process synthesis and candidate-ranking utilities for process research workflows.

  • Uses of ProcessResearchSpec in neqsim.process.research

    Method
    Description
    private void
    ProcessCandidateEvaluator.addBestPointObjectives(ProcessCandidate candidate, ProcessResearchSpec spec, double[] bestPoint)
    Adds best-point decision variable values to candidate objectives.
    private void
    ProcessCandidateGenerator.addCompressionCandidate(ProcessResearchSpec spec, List<ProcessCandidate> candidates)
    Adds a gas-compression candidate when applicable.
    private void
    ProcessSynthesisTemplateLibrary.addCompressionCoolingSeparationTrain(ProcessResearchSpec spec, String targetMaterial, List<OperationOption> options)
    Adds a compression, cooling, and polishing-separator train when the needed units are allowed.
    private void
    ProcessCandidateEvaluator.addHeatIntegrationMetrics(ProcessSystem process, ProcessCandidate candidate, ProcessResearchSpec spec, ProcessResearchMetrics metrics, boolean recordWarnings)
    Adds pinch-analysis metrics when requested.
    private void
    ProcessCandidateEvaluator.addOperatingCostMetrics(ProcessResearchSpec spec, ProcessResearchMetrics metrics)
    Adds annual operating cost metrics from energy and utility terms.
    private void
    ProcessCandidateGenerator.addOperationOptionCandidates(ProcessResearchSpec spec, List<OperationOption> operationOptions, List<ProcessCandidate> candidates)
    Adds candidates from explicit process-network operation options.
    private void
    ProcessCandidateGenerator.addPhaseSeparationCandidate(ProcessResearchSpec spec, List<ProcessCandidate> candidates)
    Adds the default phase-separation candidate when applicable.
    private void
    ProcessSynthesisTemplateLibrary.addPhaseSplitOption(ProcessResearchSpec spec, String targetMaterial, List<OperationOption> options)
    Adds a direct phase-split option when separators are allowed.
    private void
    ProcessSynthesisTemplateLibrary.addPressureLetdownOption(ProcessResearchSpec spec, String targetMaterial, List<OperationOption> options)
    Adds pressure-letdown options for expansion/JT screening.
    private void
    ProcessCandidateGenerator.addProcessNetworkPathCandidates(ProcessResearchSpec spec, List<OperationOption> operationOptions, List<ProcessCandidate> candidates)
    Adds graph-enumerated process-network path candidates.
    private void
    ProcessCandidateGenerator.addReactionCandidates(ProcessResearchSpec spec, List<ProcessCandidate> candidates)
    Adds reactor-containing candidates from reaction options.
    private void
    ProcessSynthesisTemplateLibrary.addThermalConditioningOptions(ProcessResearchSpec spec, String targetMaterial, List<OperationOption> options)
    Adds direct heater and cooler conditioning options.
    private double
    ProcessCandidateEvaluator.applyProcessPenalties(double score, ProcessResearchMetrics metrics, ProcessResearchSpec spec)
    Applies process-level penalties to the product score.
    ProcessSynthesisFeasibilityPruner.FeasibilityResult
    ProcessSynthesisFeasibilityPruner.checkOperationPath(List<OperationOption> path, ProcessResearchSpec spec)
    Checks whether an operation path is structurally valid.
    ProcessSynthesisFeasibilityPruner.FeasibilityResult
    ProcessSynthesisFeasibilityPruner.checkReaction(ReactionOption reaction, ProcessResearchSpec spec)
    Checks whether a reaction option passes basic synthesis rules.

    ProcessCandidateEvaluator.collectProcessMetrics(ProcessSystem process, ProcessCandidate candidate, ProcessResearchSpec spec, boolean recordWarnings)
    Collects process-wide energy, heat-integration, cost, emissions, and complexity metrics.

    ProcessCandidateGenerator.createGraph(ProcessResearchSpec spec, List<OperationOption> operationOptions)
    Creates a synthesis graph from explicit and template-library operations.

    Creates curated operation options for a process research specification.

    ProcessCandidateGenerator.createRoot(ProcessResearchSpec spec)
